changelog: Notifications: fixed mark-as-read not persisting — badge now uses server count instead of optimistic decrement
Notifications: click-to-navigate now survives page transition (keepalive fetch)
Notifications: badge renders instantly from server-side count, no 60s polling delay
Notifications: fixed mark-as-read button not disappearing on notifications page
Settings: fixed fatal crash on Security tab (invalid DATETIME comparison in MySQL strict mode)
Auth: fixed remember-me token not cleared on logout edge case, preventing session confusion
Dashboard: My Time widget now includes running and paused timers (consistent with Reports)
Tickets: kanban/list view now persists via cookie — no flash on page load
Tickets: after status change, redirects back to ticket list or dashboard instead of staying on ticket
New ticket: agents can set initial status when creating a ticket
New ticket: agents can log manual time with start/end times (replaces minutes-only input)
Time tracking: fixed midnight overflow — entries spanning midnight (e.g. 23:16–00:16) now calculate correctly
Help panel: keyboard shortcuts now role-aware (admin-only shortcuts hidden from agents)
Performance: timer favicon preload limited to agent/admin pages only
